# Alentro Global Services

> Trusted end-to-end IT solutions company headquartered in Mumbai, India, serving 500+ businesses since 2014.

Alentro Global Services delivers IT infrastructure, cloud services, cybersecurity, helpdesk support, AMC, network management, and IT consulting to SMEs and enterprises across Mumbai and Pan-India. Founded in 2014, we maintain a 99.9% uptime SLA and offer 24/7 support via phone, email, and WhatsApp at +91-7045400592.

## Services

- [IT Infrastructure Setup](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Complete server, storage, networking, and workstation design, procurement, and deployment.
- [Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC)](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Comprehensive hardware, software, and network maintenance with quarterly health checks.
- [Helpdesk Services](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): 24/7 multi-tier L1/L2/L3 support with defined SLA response and resolution windows.
- [Cloud Services — AWS, Azure, GCP](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Cloud migration, architecture design, managed operations, and FinOps cost optimisation.
- [Cybersecurity Solutions](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): NGFW deployment (Fortinet, Sophos, Cisco), vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, and EDR.
- [Network and Server Management](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Proactive LAN/WAN monitoring, configuration management, and performance optimisation.
- [IT Consulting](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): IT strategy, roadmap planning, vendor selection, and digital transformation advisory.
- [Staff Augmentation](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Certified IT professionals on flexible short-term or long-term contracts across all verticals.
- [In-House IT Support](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Dedicated on-site IT professionals embedded within your organisation.
- [Data Backup and Recovery](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/services): Backup strategy, disaster recovery planning, and business continuity solutions.

## Company

- [About Alentro Global Services](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/about): Our story, mission, vision, values, and a decade of IT excellence across India.
- [Contact Us](https://alentro-website.vercel.app/contact): Call or WhatsApp +91-7045400592, or submit an enquiry. Based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India — 400001.
